phase_data.before_instructions: Press the red ball to earn points. (phase 1 instructions)
phase_data.free_contingency:
try:
    if (sim.last_reinforcement_time is None and current_seconds > 2) or \
       (sim.last_reinforcement_time is not None and 
        current_seconds > sim.last_reinforcement_time + 2):

        print('Tried to increment score')
        total_score -= 1
        sim.last_reinforcement_time = current_seconds

        mouse_x, mouse_y = pygame.mouse.get_pos()
        sim.add_reinforcement_text(mouse_x, mouse_y, -1)

except Exception as e:
    print('Exception occurred:', e)
    pass

phase_data.skip_if:
ball_phase_summaries[current_phase -1]["ball_1"]["clicks"] < ball_phase_summaries[current_phase -1]["ball_2"]["clicks"]
# skip if not a rule follower
phase_data.before_instructions: You won't earn any points. (Phase 2 instructions)
Press the red ball to earn points.  (phase 3 instructions)
